query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.nickname, u.phone, u.email, u.wechat, u.role, u.isActive, u.createdAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN salespersons s ON u.id = s.userId
WHERE u.role = 'sales' AND s.id IS NULL
ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC;
